title: Loot Consumable Icon Family
description: Build a coherent loot and consumable family that works both as close-up collectible art and as compact readable UI icons.

en.title: Loot Consumable Icon Family
en.description: Build a coherent loot and consumable family that works both as close-up collectible art and as compact readable UI icons.

zh-CN.title: 战利品与消耗品图标家族
zh-CN.description: 围绕药剂、材料、钥匙、货币和补给道具，做既能放大展示也能缩成 UI 图标的道具家族。
